name: Cloud-Native & Container Platform
description: Verwaltete Kubernetes-Plattform (EKS, OpenShift, CCE) mit integriertem Container-Lifecycle-Management, Monitoring, Logging, Registries mit Vulnerability-Scanning, GitOps und Knative Serverless auf AWS und Open Telekom Cloud.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Pure technology laundry list (EKS, OpenShift, CCE, GitOps, Knative). No indication of what business problem this solves or what outcome it delivers.
Six acronyms/product names packed into one sentence: EKS, CCE, GitOps, Knative, AWS, OTC. Inaccessible to non-technical stakeholders.
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
